generated_oml:
instance LiDARPointCloudSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing point cloud data for vehicle environment perception"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor capturing vehicle state data including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
]

]

    base:desc "Sensor capturing steering angle and torque signals"

]

    base:desc "Sensor measuring servo control signals for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ServoSignalDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARPointCloudSensor
    base:desc "LiDAR point cloud data transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer"
]

instance VehicleStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
    base:desc "Vehicle state data transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer"
]

instance MotorSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorSignalSensor
    base:desc "Motor control signals transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer"
]

instance SteeringSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringSignalSensor
    base:desc "Steering control signals transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer"
]

instance ServoSignalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ServoSignalSensor
    base:desc "Servo control signals transmitted via Wi-Fi using UDP transport layer"
]

instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed LiDAR point cloud data for digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed vehicle state data including speed and position"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance MotorSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed motor control signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance SteeringSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed steering control signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ServoSignalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Processed servo control signals"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ServoSignalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs clustering and tracking of LiDAR point clouds for ACC system within Data Pre-Processing FE"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance ISO23247DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Performs serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions per ISO 23247 standard for data translation"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance ROS2CommunicationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2-based communication framework enabling real-time data monitoring for visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualizationInsight, ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight, DetectedObjectTracksInsight, DataSavingAction, ReportGenerationAction
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation based on distance, and actuation command generation) from vehicle ECU to cloud resources"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionInsight, SpeedCalculationInsight, ActuationCommandGenerationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Remote operator control for enabling/disabling ACC, setting desired speeds, and triggering emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCCmdAction, DisableACCCmdAction, SetDesiredSpeedCmdAction, TriggerEmergencyBrakingCmdAction
]

instance VehicleStateVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed, position, and orientation"
]

instance ProjectedPathVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of predicted vehicle trajectory based on current state"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Tracking and visualization of detected objects in the vehicle's environment"
]

    base:desc "Saves real-time data for later analysis and reporting"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates comprehensive reports from collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection and tracking of lead vehicles for ACC system"
]

instance SpeedCalculationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of optimal speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGenerationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates actuation commands for throttle and braking based on ACC computations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACCCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Disables Adaptive Cruise Control system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets desired speed for ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TriggerEmergencyBrakingCmdAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Triggers emergency braking command for safety"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwinSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "1/10-scale teleoperated autonomous vehicle for safe and cost-effective ACC testing"
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, DigitalTwinEntity, UserEntity
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical hardware component handling resource-specific functions including sensor data collection"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital component managing data processing and control mechanisms"
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User interface entity with 3D Visualization and Control Panel subcomponents"
    base:contains 3DVisualizationComponent, ControlPanelComponent
]

instance 3DVisualizationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization interface for real-time monitoring of vehicle and environment"
]

instance ControlPanelComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Operator control panel for ACC management commands"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for motor actuation and steering servo actuation are generated by the ACC Controlling FE, processed by the Data Translation FE for serialization and unit conversion, and transmitted over Wi-Fi UDP to the Actuation FE. The document does not specify details on command validation, authentication, feedback systems, conflict resolution, or execution confirmation mechanisms."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The system enforces 100 ms clock synchronization accuracy for coordination between devices to meet safety-critical vehicular application standards, with hardware limitations necessitating this specific temporal granularity."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 RA with deviations in the Physical Twin Entity's scope, which hosts general automotive functionality unlike the standard's OME. Components are organized into ROS2 packages per FE, deployed across separate hardware for each entity, with system-wide coordination managed through ROS2 communication and 100 ms clock synchronization for device coordination."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs via ROS2, while inter-entity communication uses Wi-Fi with UDP transport layer. Network topology, bandwidth, latency requirements, reliability mechanisms, and security protocols are not detailed in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247-2021 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which defines an entity-based structure including Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 of the standard addresses information exchange protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) cited as a potential implementation framework for Functional Entities within the architecture."
]
